scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 ptime=20 m=video 5030 RTP/AVP 98 b=TIAS:512000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len] Supported: replaces,
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMA/8000/1 ptime=20 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 98 b=TIAS:512000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len] Supported: replaces,
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMA/8000/1 ptime=20 m=video 5030 RTP/AVP 98 b=TIAS:512000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli
